body.title: OS primitives — PRIM_LIST_DIR, PRIM_FILE_META, PRIM_READ_HEAD, PRIM_TYPE_DETECT, PRIM_ITER_NEXT, PRIM_ITER_DONE
body.description: 6 reusable habits using traversal_context as shared scratchpad. Each reads/writes context keys. PRIM_LIST_DIR: lists files in a dir, writes result to ctx[files]. PRIM_FILE_META: gets mtime/size for ctx[current_file]. PRIM_READ_HEAD: reads first N lines of ctx[current_file], writes to ctx[content]. PRIM_TYPE_DETECT: detects file type from ctx[current_file], writes to ctx[file_type]. PRIM_ITER_NEXT: pops next item from ctx[files] into ctx[current_file]. PRIM_ITER_DONE: checks if ctx[files] is empty, writes ctx[done]=true/false. All implemented as action habits with code_ref pointing to tools/os_primitives.py. Seed via claudecode/seed_os_primitives.py. Prereq: T-traversal-context (done).
